tagline: Glendale barbershop on East Colorado Street.

hero.eyebrow: GLENDALE · E COLORADO ST · OPEN SIX DAYS
hero.heading: Cut sharp. Stay sharp.
hero.subheading: A neighborhood barbershop on East Colorado Street, Glendale. Classic cuts, skin fades, beard work, and the kind of straight-razor finish the regulars come back for. Walk in or call ahead.

about.label: The shop
about.heading: The chair on Colorado.
paragraphs: Classic Haircut has been on East Colorado Street in Glendale for years. Two chairs, three barbers on rotation, and the kind of neighborhood you walk to instead of drive to.
We do classic men's cuts, scissor-over-comb, skin fades, low fades, line-ups, beard sculpting with the straight razor, and the hot-towel finish that's still part of the day's work here.
Walk in or call ahead. Six days a week, nine to seven. Closed Sundays. Cash and card, same price.

services.title: Classic Cut
services.description: Scissor, clipper, or both. Your length, your finish. Hot-towel neck shave included. Thirty minutes.

services.title: Skin Fade
services.description: Bald fade blended through the top, straight-razor edge-up, clean neckline. Thirty-five minutes.

services.title: Cut + Beard
services.description: Full classic cut plus straight-razor beard work and hot-towel finish. Forty-five minutes.

services.title: Kids' Cut · 12 & Under
services.description: Same cut, smaller chair, ten dollars off. Pop in any time we're open.

services.title: Senior Rate · 65 +
services.description: Standing senior rate every chair, every day. ID gets the price.

services.title: Buzz & Edge-up
services.description: All-over single-guard buzz with a straight-razor edge-up. In and out in fifteen.

reviews.name: Ardak P.
reviews.text: Classic Haircut is the only barber I've trusted in three years. Same chair, same barber, every other Saturday. The line moves fast, the cuts are clean, and the price hasn't moved either.

reviews.name: Sevak A.
reviews.text: Walked in on a Tuesday afternoon and was out the door with the cleanest fade in twenty minutes. Now it's the only shop I go to on Colorado Street.

reviews.name: Davit T.
reviews.text: Took my son here for his first real cut. They handed him a candy bar, made him laugh, and gave him a real men's cut. He asks to come back every other Saturday now.

contact.address: 1023 E Colorado St c, Glendale, CA 91205
contact.mapEmbedQuery: Classic Haircut, 1023 E Colorado St, Glendale, CA 91205

seo.title: Classic Haircut — Glendale barbershop on East Colorado Street
seo.description: A neighborhood barbershop on East Colorado Street, Glendale. Classic cuts, skin fades, beard work, kids and senior rates. Open six days a week.
